query.text: declare @baseCurrency varchar(32) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec order by a.line_nbr

action.text: &CheckRelativeDeclare; select @$relController = 'ARInvoice', @$relType = 'Lookup', @$relParent = '' &CheckRelativeCall; declare @unitCode varchar(32), @voucherNumber varchar(32), @payID varchar(32), @baseCurrency varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end, @voucherNumber = dbo.ff_PadL(@so_hd, col_length('cttt20', 'so_ct')) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' if exists(select 1 from cttt20 where ma_dvcs = @unitCode and ma_kh = @$ma_kh and ngay_ct <= @$ngay_lct and loai_tt = 0 and stt_rec = @stt_rec_hd and so_ct = @voucherNumber) select @payID = @stt_rec_hd else select top 1 @payID = stt_rec from cttt20 where ma_dvcs = @unitCode and ma_kh = @$ma_kh and ngay_ct <= @$ngay_lct and loai_tt = 0 and (tat_toan = 0 or (stt_rec in (select stt_rec_tt from cttt20 where stt_rec = @$stt_rec and loai_tt = 1))) and so_ct = @voucherNumber order by stt_rec if @payID is not null begin select rtrim(a.tk) as tk, a.ngay_ct, case when isnull(a.ma_nt, '') = '' then @baseCurrency else rtrim(a.ma_nt) end as ma_nt, a.ty_gia, a.so_lsx, rtrim(a.ma_vv) as ma_vv, rtrim(a.ma_sp) as ma_sp, rtrim(a.ma_bp) as ma_bp, rtrim(a.ma_hd) as ma_hd, rtrim(a.ma_ku) as ma_ku, rtrim(a.ma_phi) as ma_phi, case when isnull(a.ma_nt, '') = '' then t_tt else t_tt_nt end as so_tien, t_tt_qd, case when isnull(a.ma_nt, '') = '' then t_tt - t_tt_qd else t_tt_nt - t_tt_qd end as con_pt_nt from cttt20 a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk where a.stt_rec = @payID return end

title.v: Lấy số liệu từ hóa đơn thu vượt$$90
